title: PlayerHide
description: Allow your players to toggle visibility of others for events! Supports particles!
body:
![PlayerHide](https://i.imgur.com/9Q3VctO.png) ## Sneak Peeks ![](https://i.imgur.com/3ht2pX1.gif) ![](https://i.imgur.com/5BaK4Ja.gif) **Have questions? Visit the wiki or get help on discord:** [![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/PlayerHide/wiki) [![](https://i.imgur.com/ZIMj2rG.png)](https://discord.gg/X8VSdZvBQY)
### What is PlayerHide? **PlayerHide** is a lightweight utility plugin for your players to toggle their visibility of others! This is useful for events such as parkour, mazes or puzzles where allowing players to see each other may cause hindrance/unfairness. It currently supports the following features: - Option to fully hide all players or replace players with particles (see gif above) - Option to adjust particle count - Option to force hide players on join - Option to toggle visibility through commands - Option to toggle visibility through a given item with an option to disallow players from throwing them (useful for lobbies) - Fully customizable messages (with options for your own language files!)
### You can find tutorials for the setup as well as more information on the wiki page below!
[![](https://i.imgur.com/dYXX5sg.png)](https://github.com/tjtanjin/PlayerHide/wiki) ### Like my work? Check out my other plugins below!
